title: Very large number operations give strange results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE large_numbers (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value REAL);
SELECT id, value, value + 1000000000000.0 AS adjusted_value FROM large_numbers;
SELECT SUM(value) FROM large_numbers WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT CAST(SUM(value) AS REAL) FROM large_numbers;
key_bug_features: Very large number operations yield incorrect results
